aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Unlimited Floors due to a lack of structured content and conversational depth. Their current site content is keyword-focused but lacks the detailed, FAQ-style information AI models prioritize.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content addressing common customer queries about flooring services.
Add HowTo schema markup for popular services like hardwood installation and refinishing.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized but missing key engagement features.
critical_issues: No Q&A section engagement or responses to customer questions.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes them less visible to AI.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'Nashville hardwood floor installation' and 'flooring repair near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content and HowTo schema for key services.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning the owner, George, as an expert through media features and detailed project case studies.

agency_pitch.hook: Get cited by AI and capture the 40% of leads your competitors are missing.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they are losing visibility and potential customers who rely on AI assistants for recommendations.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI models prioritize sites with detailed, structured content and FAQs.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement FAQ content, add relevant schema markup, and create conversational content to align with AI search trends.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are likely optimizing for AI search; acting now prevents losing market share.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth for Unlimited Floors Nashville
opening_line: We analyzed your site and identified key opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI search and capture more leads.
